'''鈭歴h-j-k''' ('''shajaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imagine|imagine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imagine|imagine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-j-k
|-
! Lemma
| shajaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajakithi|shajakithi]] || [[word:shajakiji|shajakiji]] || [[word:shajakishi|shajakishi]] || [[word:shajaki|shajaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajakuthuth|shajakuthuth]] || [[word:shajakujuj|shajakujuj]] || [[word:shajakushush|shajakushush]] || [[word:shajak|shajak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajakuthu|shajakuthu]] || [[word:shajakuju|shajakuju]] || [[word:shajakushu|shajakushu]] || [[word:shajaku|shajaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajakufuth|shajakufuth]] || [[word:shajakufuj|shajakufuj]] || [[word:shajakufush|shajakufush]] || [[word:shajakuf|shajakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajakethe|shajakethe]] || [[word:shajakeje|shajakeje]] || [[word:shajakeshe|shajakeshe]] || [[word:shajake|shajake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajakothoth|shajakothoth]] || [[word:shajakojoj|shajakojoj]] || [[word:shajakoshosh|shajakoshosh]] || [[word:shajak|shajak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajakotho|shajakotho]] || [[word:shajakojo|shajakojo]] || [[word:shajakosho|shajakosho]] || [[word:shajako|shajako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajakofoth|shajakofoth]] || [[word:shajakofoj|shajakofoj]] || [[word:shajakofosh|shajakofosh]] || [[word:shajakof|shajakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajak忙th忙|shajak忙th忙]] || [[word:shajak忙j忙|shajak忙j忙]] || [[word:shajak忙sh忙|shajak忙sh忙]] || [[word:shajak忙|shajak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajakathath|shajakathath]] || [[word:shajakajaj|shajakajaj]] || [[word:shajakashash|shajakashash]] || [[word:shajak|shajak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajakatha|shajakatha]] || [[word:shajakaja|shajakaja]] || [[word:shajakasha|shajakasha]] || [[word:shajaka|shajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajakafath|shajakafath]] || [[word:shajakafaj|shajakafaj]] || [[word:shajakafash|shajakafash]] || [[word:shajakaf|shajakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shajakasha|shajakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajakasha|goshajakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajakasha|gokishajakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shajakn眉sha|shajakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajaknkn眉sha|goshajaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakn眉sha|gokishajakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajaksh毛sha|shajaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajaknksh毛sha|goshajaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajaksh毛sha|gokishajaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakrosha|shajakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaknkrosha|goshajaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakrosha|gokishajakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakmusha|shajakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaknkmusha|goshajaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakmusha|gokishajakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajaksherasha|shajaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajaknksherasha|goshajaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajaksherasha|gokishajaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajakngasha|shajakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajaknkngasha|goshajaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajakngasha|gokishajakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajakyasha|shajakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajaknkyasha|goshajaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajakyasha|gokishajakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajakyamasha|shajakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajaknkyamasha|goshajaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajakyamasha|gokishajakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakn眉sh毛sha|shajakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajaknkn眉sh毛sha|goshajaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakn眉sh毛sha|gokishajakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakn眉rosha|shajakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaknkn眉rosha|goshajaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakn眉rosha|gokishajakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakn眉musha|shajakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaknkn眉musha|goshajaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakn眉musha|gokishajakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajaksh毛n眉sha|shajaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajaknksh毛n眉sha|goshajaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajaksh毛n眉sha|gokishajaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajaksh毛rosha|shajaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaknksh毛rosha|goshajaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajaksh毛rosha|gokishajaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajaksh毛musha|shajaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaknksh毛musha|goshajaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajaksh毛musha|gokishajaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajakron眉sha|shajakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajaknkron眉sha|goshajaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakron眉sha|gokishajakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakrosh毛sha|shajakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajaknkrosh毛sha|goshajaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakrosh毛sha|gokishajakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajakromusha|shajakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajaknkromusha|goshajaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajakromusha|gokishajakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajakmun眉sha|shajakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajaknkmun眉sha|goshajaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajakmun眉sha|gokishajakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajakmush毛sha|shajakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajaknkmush毛sha|goshajaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajakmush毛sha|gokishajakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajakmurosha|shajakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajaknkmurosha|goshajaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajakmurosha|gokishajakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shajak|shajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙j忙k|sh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshajak|hoshajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙j忙k|hosh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshajak|hohoshajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙j忙k|hohosh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shajak|n眉shajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙j忙k|n眉sh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shajak|n眉n眉shajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙j忙k|n眉n眉sh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shajak|n茂shajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙j忙k|n茂sh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shajak|n茂n茂shajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙j忙k|n茂n茂sh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushajak|lushajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙j忙k|lush忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushajak|lulushajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙j忙k|lulush忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishajak|lishajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙j忙k|lish忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishajak|lilishajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙j忙k|lilish忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshajak|koshajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙j忙k|kosh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshajak|kokoshajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙j忙k|kokosh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshajak|keshajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙j忙k|kesh忙j忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshajak|kekeshajak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙j忙k|kekesh忙j忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
